channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PALASHSEC] Palash Securities Board Meeting on May 15, 2026
item.description:
Palash Securities Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend, if any, for the financial year, subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Dividend recommendation to be discussed.
  • Meeting is pursuant to Regulation 29(1) of SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Palash Securities Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAL] Resourceful Auto Responds to BSE Clarification Request
item.description:
Resourceful Automobile Ltd. responded to BSE's request for clarification regarding recent price movement, stating that all material events have been disclosed as per SEBI regulations. The company asserts that the price movement is purely market-driven and beyond their control or knowledge. They ensure continued compliance with disclosure norms.

  • Resourceful Auto confirms timely disclosure of all price-sensitive information to BSE.
  • Company states no undisclosed information or impending corporate actions exist.
  • Share price movement attributed to market conditions beyond company control.
  • Management denies any connection to the fluctuations in the share price.
  • Resourceful Auto assures continued compliance with SEBI disclosure norms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Resourceful Automobile Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [CAPFIN] Capfin India Board Meeting on May 11, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Capfin India Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on May 11, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company has informed the BSE about this meeting in compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Capfin India's board will meet on May 11, 2026.
  • The meeting will focus on approving audited financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The announcement complies with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capfin India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INTERISE] Interise Trust: Igatpuri Highway Concession Ends May 6, 2026
item.description:
Interise Trust informs the Exchange that the concession period for Igatpuri Highway Private Limited, a Special Purpose Vehicle of the Trust, concluded on May 6, 2026. This is in accordance with the concession agreement with the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI). The Project SPV will hand over the project, a 4-lane road from Vadape to Gonde on NH-3 in Maharashtra, to NHAI as per the agreement terms.

  • Igatpuri Highway Private Ltd concession period concluded May 6, 2026.
  • Project SPV will hand over the project to NHAI.
  • Project is a 4-lane road on NH-3 in Maharashtra.
  • Concession agreement was between Project SPV and NHAI.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTERISE TRUST | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BALGOPAL] Balgopal Commercial Gets BSE Trading Approval for 19 Lakh Shares
item.description:
Balgopal Commercial Ltd. received trading approval from BSE Limited for 19,00,000 equity shares of ₹10 each, issued at a premium of ₹50 each to promoters on a preferential basis. The approval, dated May 5, 2026, via E-letter no. LOD/PREF/SV/48/2026-27, allows trading of these shares, bearing distinctive numbers from 19010001 to 20910000, effective from Wednesday, May 6, 2026.

  • Balgopal Commercial received BSE trading approval.
  • Approval is for 19,00,000 equity shares.
  • Shares issued to promoters on preferential basis.
  • Trading effective from May 6, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Balgopal Commercial Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [SEPC] SEPC Ltd: Madras HC Interim Directions on Trust Account
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Hon'ble High Court of Madras passed an order on April 30, 2026, regarding E.P.Nos.7 of 2024, 91 & 92 of 2023, 15 & 16 of 2025. The order permits the consortium of banks to appropriate up to ₹15.69 crore from the Trust & Retention Account towards dues under the approved resolution plan. SEPC Limited is allowed to utilize up to ₹2 crore for salary payments. Twarit Consultancy Services Pvt. Limited is directed to deposit ₹2.5 crore with the Registrar General and file an affidavit regarding the source of funds for ₹7.5 crore per quarter. The matter is posted for further hearing on June 23, 2026. SEPC Ltd. states there will be no financial impact on the company due to an indemnification agreement.

  • Madras HC allows banks to appropriate up to ₹15.69 Cr from Trust Account.
  • SEPC Ltd. can use up to ₹2 Cr for salary payments as per court order.
  • Twarit Consultancy Services to deposit ₹2.5 Cr with the Registrar General.
  • Next hearing is scheduled for June 23, 2026.
  • SEPC Ltd. claims no financial impact due to indemnification agreement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEPC Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [DESCO] Desco Infratech Achieves Operational Milestone in FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Desco Infratech Ltd reports improved operational performance for FY 2025-26, marked by growth in PE line commissioning, meter installations, O&M activities, and AMC services. The company has also diversified into new segments like steel laying, DP structure installations, household connections under JJM, DI pipe laying, power cable works, and solar EPC projects. Management highlights the company's strengthened execution platform and diversified presence across multiple sectors.

  • PE Line Commissioning increased to 5,75,248 meters in FY26.
  • Meter Installations grew by 15.04% to 50,031 in FY26.
  • O&M Activities more than doubled, growing by over 109%.
  • AMC Services Executed increased by around 49.22% in FY26.
  • Diversified into new segments including solar EPC and water infrastructure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Desco Infratech Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MEDIASSIST] Medi Assist Board Meeting on May 9, 2026 to Consider Results & Dividend
item.description:
Medi Assist Healthcare Services Ltd has scheduled a Board meeting on May 9, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and recommend a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26, if any. An earnings call is scheduled for May 11, 2026, to discuss the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 9, 2026 to approve FY26 financial results.
  • Board to consider recommending a final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after results declaration.
  • Earnings call scheduled for May 11, 2026, at 8:30 am IST.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Medi Assist Healthcare Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus: USFDA Inspection Concludes at Ahmedabad Plant
item.description:
The USFDA conducted a GMP surveillance inspection at Zydus Lifesciences' Unit 9 facility in Ahmedabad from April 27 to May 5, 2026. The inspection concluded with seven observations, none of which were related to data integrity. Zydus Lifesciences will work with the USFDA to address the observations.

  • USFDA inspected Zydus' Biologics Injectable plant in Ahmedabad.
  • The inspection was conducted from April 27 to May 5, 2026.
  • The inspection closed with seven observations.
  • No data integrity related observations were noted.
  • Zydus will work with USFDA to address the observations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: USFDA

item.title: [KIMS] KIMS Board Meeting Scheduled for May 15, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results.

  • KIMS Board meeting to approve FY26 financial results on May 15, 2026.
  • Meeting will cover audited standalone and consolidated results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
